title: French Rocket Salad with Date Vinaigrette
description: A simple yet elegant French-inspired salad featuring fresh rocket leaves, sweet dates, and a tangy vinaigrette.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Fleur de sel or flaky sea salt

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the rocket leaves and pitted dates.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, apple cider vinegar, honey, salt, and black pepper.
Drizzle the vinaigrette over the rocket mixture and toss to combine.
Season to taste with additional salt and pepper if needed.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional dates if desired.
